toc_content:
Specification of the AUTOSAR Network
Management Protocol
AUTOSAR FO Release 1.5.0
Table of Contents
1 Introduction and overview 4
1.1 Protocol purpose and objectives : 4
1.2 Applicability of the protocol : 5
1.2.1 Constraints and assumptions : 5
1.2.2 Limitations : 5
1.3 Dependencies : 5
1.3.1 Dependencies to other protocol layers : 5
1.3.2 Dependencies to other standards and norms : 5
1.3.3 Dependencies to the Application Layer : 5
2 Use Cases 6
3 Protocol Requirements 7
3.1 Requirements Traceability : 7
4 Definition of terms and acronyms 8
4.1 Acronyms and abbreviations : 8
4.2 Definition of terms : 8
5 Protocol specification 9
5.1 NM message format : 9
5.1.1 Source Node Identifier : 9
5.1.2 Control Bit Vector : 9
5.1.3 User Data : 10
5.2 Partial Networking : 10
5.2.1 Handling of Rx NM messages : 11
5.2.2 Handling of Tx NM messages : 11
5.3 Timing behavior : 12
5.3.1 Sending NM message : 12
5.3.2 Transition to Bus-Sleep Mode : 12
5.4 Networks specifics : 13
5.4.1 CAN and Ethernet : 13
5.4.2 FlexRay : 13
5.5 Sequences : 15
5.5.1 Communication request : 15
5.5.2 Communication release : 16
6 Configuration parameters 17
6.1 NM Message Layout : 17
6.2 Timeout Parameters : 17
7 Protocol usage and guidelines 18
3 of 18
— AUTOSAR CONFIDENTIAL —Document ID 928: AUTOSAR_PRS_NetworkManagementProtocol
